campaignId.description: The ID of the campaign to duplicate. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

contactEmail.description: The email of the contact to add to the contact list

fieldName.description: The name of the field to add custom field to

value.description: The value to set on custom field

fieldName.description: The name of the field to add custom field to

value.description: The value to set on custom field

firstName.description: First name of the contact to add

lastContacted.description: Last contacted date of the contact to add

lastName.description: Last name of the contact to add

lastOpen.description: Last opened date of the contact to add

lastReplied.description: Last replied date of the contact to add

mailsSent.description: Number of emails sent to the contact to add

phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the contact to add

campaignName.description: The name of the new campaign to create

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

copyContacts.description: Whether to copy all the contacts from the original campaign

copyProvider.description: Whether to set the same email provider than the original campaign

copyMails.description: Whether to copy all the steps of the email sequence from the original campaign

copySettings.description: Whether to copy all the general settings from the original campaign

contactListId.description: The ID of the contact list to add the contact to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
